text:
Created attachment 228606
py-zabbix-api.patch

zabbix-api is a Python package that provides python access to zabbix API. this packages is used by `community.zabbix` Ansible Collection to manage zabbix resources from ansible.

community.zabbix Ansible Collection
https://github.com/ansible-collections/community.zabbix
https://docs.ansible.com/ansible/2.10/collections/community/zabbix/
